brand_identity.vibe: Command-center focus, elite athleticism, high-visibility tactical look

body.style: geometric sans, increased tracking for legibility

layout_spacing.grid_strategy: Control Room Protocol (Dense, data correlation, scanability)
layout_spacing.shadows: Replace soft shadows with 1px solid strokes or 2px 'Inner Glow' highlights

components_customization.buttons: Sharp corners, high contrast text, slight scale transform on active, explicitly set hover text color
components_customization.cards: Flat background (#141414), 1px subtle border, no soft shadow, sharp edges
components_customization.inputs: Solid dark background (#1C1C1C), 1px subtle border, focus state uses brand primary border
components_customization.tables: Dense layout, uppercase table headers with tracking, alternating row subtle background, sharp borders
components_customization.dialogs: Solid dark background (No glassmorphism for forms to ensure data clarity), tight padding
components_customization.charts: Accessible color palettes, strong contrast for lines/bars, avoid muddy gradients

motion.loading: Tactical scanning line or sharp spinning dash

image_urls.description: red and black dumbbell on black floor, ideal for gym owner landing page hero background with a bg-black/50 overlay
dark gym workout background for feature section
healthy meal prep background for diet planning feature section
Muscular man exercising in gym, great for auth screen side panel or testimonial

instructions_to_main_agent: Strictly follow the Dark Theme and Performance Pro archetype rules.

The application is a multi-tenant platform. Ensure the gym owner dashboard allows changing the primary brand color and logo. Use CSS variables for the primary color (--primary) so it can be dynamically overridden per tenant.
For typography, use Bebas Neue for all H1, H2, H3 headings. Apply 'uppercase' and 'tracking-tight' to these headings. Use Manrope for body text and UI elements.
Implement the 'Control Room' grid layout for the admin and gym owner dashboards: tight gaps (gap-4 or gap-6) and full-height widget utilization.
Avoid Shadcn 'Card' soft shadows. Override them to have 1px solid borders (border-white/10) with flat backgrounds (#141414).
Use Phosphor Icons (@phosphor-icons/react) for a dense, high-end tech feel.
Add 'data-testid' to all interactive elements for testing (e.g., login-form-submit-button).
Hero sections on landing pages must have an overlay of bg-black/50 or bg-gradient-to-r from-black/80 via-black/40 to-black/80 to ensure text readability.
Ensure the Excel-like food database view in the admin panel uses a dense table layout, taking up maximum horizontal space for data correlation.
